meta.name: S-Coin Comment Templates - Casual Malaysia 200x2
meta.description: 400 customer-editable S-Coin review templates: 200 earn comments and 200 redeem comments. Casual Malaysian Malay/Manglish style with short forms and natural social media tone.
meta.recommended_use: Use as starting suggestions only. Customer can edit before copying to Google Review.

earn: {item}
{price}
{percent}
{netValue}
redeem: {item}
{points}
{value}

notes: Earn comments use item, formatted price, cashback percent, and net S-Coin value after 5% deduction.
Redeem comments use item, formatted S-Coin points, and formatted redemption value.
The HTML should load this file as scoin_comments.json from the same directory.
